== Notes for [[Item:Q83798|Q83798]] ==

From ''Banu Taym'' Tribe.

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Talhah
--------------------
From ''Banu Taym'' Tribe (Part of ''Banu Quraysh'' Tribe).

Source 1: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Banu_Taym

Source 2: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Talha_ibn_Ubayd-Allah

Source 3: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Umm_Kulthum_bint_Abu_Bakr

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
